role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and assigned neutral confidence.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and architectural style consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Ficus, palms) and their regional distribution.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed infrastructure standards (utility poles, road edges) and building codes.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like camera generation and vehicle models.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the region and country. The agents provided solid, image-grounded evidence for the Maghreb region, and the meta-agent's use of camera generation artifacts was a strong differentiator.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of white cubic architecture and arid soil match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of manicured hedges and sparse vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of concrete poles and flat roofs match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the VW Golf and general street furniture match the image.
